query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A rear view of a person wearing a baseball cap and holding a phone to their ear, positioned in front of bright vertical window blinds.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A rear view of a person wearing a baseball cap and holding a phone to their ear, positioned in front of bright vertical window blinds. The subject is almost entirely swallowed by crushed shadows from extreme underexposure, eliminating discernible facial or clothing textures, while the background exhibits visible color banding and posterization across the illuminated vertical strips.
